stories.headline: Oil prices rise despite UAE exit from OPEC as Iran war ceasefire hangs in balance

stories.headline: At State Dinner, King Charles Charms the Court of Trump
stories.summary: King Charles III presented President Trump with a golden bell. “Should you ever need to get hold of us,” the king said, “well, just give us a ring!”

stories.headline: King Charles Urges US to Reject Isolationism
stories.summary: US and UK ties are at their lowest point since the Suez Crisis in the 1950s as King Charles III visits Washington. In an address to lawmakers, Charles argued for preserving the countries' alliance. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.summary: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump welcomed Britain’s King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House for a state dinner in the East Room.

stories.headline: Iran war: What’s happening on day 61 as UAE exits OPEC?

stories.summary: US president says Iran has reached out and asked Washington to lift its naval blockade on Iranian ports.

stories.summary: During the White House state dinner on Tuesday evening, King Charles III highlighted “one of the most consequential alliances in human history” in a largely jovial and lighthearted speech.

stories.headline: Watch: Key moments from King Charles III’s address to US Congress
stories.summary: King Charles III addressed US Congress, stressing the importance of the UK-US partnership in facing global challenges. Lawmakers applauded as he mixed humor, history and forward-looking remarks in a rare speech by a British monarch.

stories.headline: Full Guest List for Trump’s State Dinner With Charles and Camilla
stories.summary: Six members of the Supreme Court were invited to the dinner, alongside top administration officials, billionaires and Republican lawmakers.

stories.headline: King Charles urges checks on executive power as Trump hosts royal visit

stories.summary: Qatar has introduced new measures to maintain market stability and reinforce investor confidence as regional tensions weigh on economic sentiment.

stories.summary: The two-day segment of ministers and senior officials marks the political centerpiece of the First Conference on Transitioning away from Fossil Fuels, where more than 50 countries have been discussing how to move away from oil, gas and coal.

stories.summary: Evelyn Chow’s space-focused stock fund is scouring Europe for bargains just as the looming debut of SpaceX supercharges valuations in the US.

stories.summary: Hedge-fund firm Millennium Management and Norway’s sovereign-wealth fund Norges Bank Investment Management are among those that participated in battery maker Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd.’s $5 billion share sale, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: Airbus Suffers Earnings Drop in First Quarter
stories.summary: Airbus SE’s adjusted earnings before interest and tax and revenue both fell short of analyst estimates in the first quarter, dragged down by a steep earnings drop at the main aircraft making subsidiary. The company said it’s confident it can achieve its full-year aircraft delivery and earnings targets. Bloomberg’s Benedikt Kammel reports.

stories.headline: GSK’s Overhaul Undermined by Decline From Older Medicines
stories.summary: GSK Plc’s older respiratory medicines showed lackluster sales in the first quarter, leaving HIV and cancer drugs to drive profit growth.

stories.headline: Morocco Firm Plans First Fundraise for $25 Billion Gas Pipeline
stories.summary: Morocco’s state-controlled natural resources company plans to start raising part of the $25 billion needed to build a pipeline that will link gas fields in West Africa to the Mediterranean coastline.

stories.headline: Japan Confirms Hormuz Transit as Iran Talks Continue, PM Says
stories.summary: Japan’s prime minister confirmed that a ship linked to the country has transited the Strait of Hormuz, as Tokyo continues to lobby Tehran for the safe passage of all vessels through the chokepoint.

stories.headline: Deutsche Bank Flags Commercial Property as Risk After Hit

stories.headline: Deutsche CFO Says Credit, FX Continue to 'Outperform' Expectations

stories.headline: China Rare Earth Firms Rally After Strong Earnings, Beijing Plan

stories.headline: Indian billionaire's son offers to save Escobar's hippos
